response.global_analysis: Introductory dialogue and safety rules provided by the hosts, Ina and Kiara. There are no reference lyrics available, so I am relying entirely on the clear spoken audio. I have segmented the speech into logical phrases under 50 characters to maintain readability while adhering to strict timing dictated by the vocal onset. I am including the humorous misreading and banter between the performers. No subtitles are generated for the instrumental music segment as per the rule to never output text without vocal audio.

subtitles.original: Good morning, afternoon, evening everyone!
subtitles.english: Good morning, afternoon, evening everyone!

subtitles.original: This is Ninomae Ina'nis!
subtitles.english: This is Ninomae Ina'nis!

subtitles.original: That's right, it is finally time to start Day 2!
subtitles.english: That's right, it is finally time to start Day 2!

subtitles.original: Is everyone hyped?!
subtitles.english: Is everyone hyped?!

subtitles.original: Hype, hype, hype, hype!
subtitles.english: Hype, hype, hype, hype!

subtitles.original: All right, before we kick things off, of course,
subtitles.english: All right, before we kick things off, of course,

subtitles.original: we have some important safety rules
subtitles.english: we have some important safety rules

subtitles.original: and house guidelines to go over.
subtitles.english: and house guidelines to go over.

subtitles.original: First, photography and the use of
subtitles.english: First, photography and the use of

subtitles.original: recording equipment are strictly prohibited...
subtitles.english: recording equipment are strictly prohibited...

subtitles.original: ...during the performance. However,
subtitles.english: ...during the performance. However,

subtitles.original: if you are watching from home,
subtitles.english: if you are watching from home,

subtitles.original: screenshots are allowed.
subtitles.english: screenshots are allowed.

subtitles.original: Please take lots of screenshots.
subtitles.english: Please take lots of screenshots.

subtitles.original: スクショはOKですよ！
subtitles.english: Screenshots are okay!

subtitles.original: Also, the venue is smoke-free,
subtitles.english: Also, the venue is smoke-free,

subtitles.original: so please refrain from smoking inside.
subtitles.english: so please refrain from smoking inside.

subtitles.original: Unless you're smoking hot like me!
subtitles.english: Unless you're smoking hot like me!

subtitles.original: We've heard that one before.
subtitles.english: We've heard that one before.

subtitles.original: If you start, un-feeling well...
subtitles.english: If you start, un-feeling well...

subtitles.original: (I'm feeling well...)
subtitles.english: (I'm feeling well...)

subtitles.original: Unfeeling well!
subtitles.english: Unfeeling well!

subtitles.original: If you start feeling unwell at any point,
subtitles.english: If you start feeling unwell at any point,

subtitles.original: please don't push yourself.
subtitles.english: please don't push yourself.

subtitles.original: Just reach out to the nearest staff member
subtitles.english: Just reach out to the nearest staff member

subtitles.original: for help, and drink water.
subtitles.english: for help, and drink water.

subtitles.original: For everyone's safety, please avoid any
subtitles.english: For everyone's safety, please avoid any

subtitles.original: dangerous or disruptive behavior.
subtitles.english: dangerous or disruptive behavior.

subtitles.original: This once again, no matter how hyped it is,
subtitles.english: This once again, no matter how hyped it is,

subtitles.original: includes moshing, diving...
subtitles.english: includes moshing, diving...

subtitles.original: ...sitting on shoulders, jumping excessively,
subtitles.english: ...sitting on shoulders, jumping excessively,

subtitles.original: or throwing objects towards the stage.
subtitles.english: or throwing objects towards the stage.

subtitles.original: Climbing onto the stage, intentionally
subtitles.english: Climbing onto the stage, intentionally

subtitles.original: blocking the aisles,
subtitles.english: blocking the aisles,

subtitles.original: or rushing towards the front is not allowed.
subtitles.english: or rushing towards the front is not allowed.

subtitles.original: Please refrain from disruptive shouting,
subtitles.english: Please refrain from disruptive shouting,

subtitles.original: erratic lightstick movements,
subtitles.english: erratic lightstick movements,

subtitles.original: or any extreme motions that might interfere
subtitles.english: or any extreme motions that might interfere

subtitles.original: with the experience of those around you.
subtitles.english: with the experience of those around you.

subtitles.original: Be considerate.
subtitles.english: Be considerate.

subtitles.original: If you don't follow the instructions of
subtitles.english: If you don't follow the instructions of

subtitles.original: our staff, you may be asked to leave.
subtitles.english: our staff, you may be asked to leave.

subtitles.original: Yeah, please keep in mind that the venue,
subtitles.english: Yeah, please keep in mind that the venue,

subtitles.original: organizers, performers, and staff...
subtitles.english: organizers, performers, and staff...

subtitles.original: ...cannot be held responsible for accidents,
subtitles.english: ...cannot be held responsible for accidents,

subtitles.original: equipment damage, or trouble
subtitles.english: equipment damage, or trouble

subtitles.original: caused by failing to follow instructions.
subtitles.english: caused by failing to follow instructions.

subtitles.original: So you stumbled over the same words.

subtitles.english: I can't read.

subtitles.original: from ignoring these rules
subtitles.english: from ignoring these rules

subtitles.original: will be the responsibility of the person.
subtitles.english: will be the responsibility of the person.

subtitles.english: There are cameras in the venue for filming

subtitles.original: and photography today,
subtitles.english: and photography today,

subtitles.english: and you might appear in the footage.

subtitles.original: These may be used for promotional purposes,
subtitles.english: These may be used for promotional purposes,

subtitles.original: so please keep that in mind.
subtitles.english: so please keep that in mind.

subtitles.original: And finally, just like yesterday,
subtitles.english: And finally, just like yesterday,

subtitles.original: the concert will be in two parts.
subtitles.english: the concert will be in two parts.

subtitles.original: There's a part for Wawa and a part for me,
subtitles.english: There's a part for Wawa and a part for me,

subtitles.original: so please look forward to them!
subtitles.english: so please look forward to them!

subtitles.english: The show is about to begin, so get ready!
